name: Example Project
context: Replace this with a one-sentence description of what the project does. The agent uses this as a fallback when the project's own AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md is missing.
next_task: Replace this with the specific next task you want the agent to do.
goals: Goal one -- what you want this project to achieve
log: Replace these log entries with what the agent has actually done. The agent appends to this list on every cycle.

name: Another Project
context: Set the agent to 'improving' status when the obvious work is done and you want it to discover the next high-impact improvement on its own.
next_task: Optional: a specific next task. If blank, the agent runs its improvement-discovery prompt.
goals: Find and fix a class of silent-failure bugs
